forgot_password.title: Forgot password
forgot_password.subtitle: Password reset
forgot_password.instruction: Enter your email to receive a reset link.
forgot_password.success_message: If an account is associated with {{email}}, you will receive a password reset link within a few minutes.

reset_password.title: New password
reset_password.subtitle: Set a new password
reset_password.hint: At least 10 characters, including one uppercase letter and one digit.
reset_password.success_message: You will be redirected to the sign-in page...

errors.too_short: Password must be at least 10 characters.
errors.no_uppercase: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter.
errors.no_digit: Password must contain at least one digit.
errors.invalid_token: Invalid or expired link. Request a new one.
errors.unexpected: Unexpected error. Please try again later.

account.title: My account
account.subtitle: User profile and password management.
account.password_hint: At least 10 characters, including one uppercase letter and one digit.

errors.too_short: New password must be at least 10 characters.
errors.no_uppercase: New password must contain at least one uppercase letter.
errors.no_digit: New password must contain at least one digit.
errors.same_as_current: New password must differ from the current one.
